title: Femboy's Realms
description: "Femboy's Realms" is the initial step for our custom Minecraft launcher and upcoming server that we are developing.
body:
My main goal in designing this modpack was to provide players with the smoothest and most visually rich experience, while also preparing a stable and high-performance infrastructure for my own projects. My aim is to enhance the overall Minecraft experience by providing an easily accessible, optimized, and aesthetic gaming environment through my future "I haven't found a name for it yet, so I'm not writing it" project.


<details>
<summary>Performance Focus</summary>

At the heart of Femboy's Realms is ensuring every player enjoys a seamless gaming experience with high frame rates (FPS). To achieve this, I've integrated industry-leading performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Iris, Ferrite Core, and EntityCulling. These mods optimize the game's CPU and GPU usage, delivering smooth gameplay even with content-heavy mods like Biomes O' Plenty. My objective is for players to enjoy the game without frustrating stutters or low FPS issues, regardless of their hardware.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Visual and Aesthetic Experience</summary>

Another significant aim of the modpack is to enhance Minecraft's visual appeal. I've added hundreds of new and breathtaking biomes to explore with Biomes O' Plenty. Mods like 3D Skin Layers, Better Third Person, and NotEnoughAnimations offer more detailed and vibrant animations for player characters and the overall game world. Sodium Dynamic Lights further enhances the ambiance with dynamic lighting, creating a visually richer and more impressive world. This way, players don't just play the game; they also enjoy a visual feast.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Social and Creative Interaction</summary>

Supporting social interaction and creativity, which are crucial for my future server project, is also among the modpack's objectives. Plasmo Voice offers proximity-based voice chat, allowing for more realistic and immersive communication with your friends. WorldEdit is an indispensable tool for those looking to build massive structures on the server or in their personal worlds, removing technical barriers to creativity. No Chat Reports ensures players can communicate comfortably without worrying about chat privacy.

</details>

In essence, Femboy's Realms is a modpack built to maximize game performance and aesthetics, support social interaction and creativity, and serve as the foundation for my own Minecraft ecosystem (launcher and server). My goal is to transform the Minecraft experience into a Realm that is both fluid and offers limitless potential.
